scripts.dev:local: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,dashboard,storefront,preview -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/canvas-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/canvas-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/storefront" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/preview-server"
scripts.stdb:publish: cd spacetime && spacetime publish --server maincloud selorax-canvas
scripts.stdb:generate: npm run stdb:generate:backend && npm run stdb:generate:dashboard && npm run stdb:generate:preview
scripts.stdb:deploy: npm run stdb:publish && npm run stdb:generate
